dossier_boundary: bounded source dossier plus claim/evidence records only
reviewer_independence: role separation declared for fixture; independence not externally established
unchanged_evidence_guard: cannot promote on unchanged evidence without new evidence or corrected mapping
retrieval_expansion_policy: expand retrieval only for named missing evidence
findings: claim support is narrower than prose
dissent: Citation critic dissents from accepting the current claim wording.
unresolved_issues: claim wording remains broader than reviewed evidence
required_actions: preserve dissent in the claim ledger
human_adjudication: required before any public release claim uses the revised wording
